select
        

    dateadd(
        hour,
        -6,
        
        cast('2021-04-21 13:50:44.234000' as timestamp)
    
        )

 as lower_limit,
        least(

    dateadd(
        day,
        20,
        
        cast('2021-04-21 13:50:44.234000' as timestamp)
    
        )

,
              
    convert_timezone('UTC', convert_timezone('UTC', current_timestamp()))::timestamp
) as upper_limit

with new_events_session_ids_init as (
            select
            
                COALESCE(
                    
e.contexts_com_snowplowanalytics_snowplow_client_session_1[0]:sessionId::TEXT
,NULL
                ) as session_identifier,
                max(
                    COALESCE(
                        
e.contexts_com_snowplowanalytics_snowplow_client_session_1[0]:userId::TEXT
,NULL
                    )
                ) as user_identifier, -- Edge case 1: Arbitary selection to avoid window function like first_value.
            
                min(collector_tstamp) as start_tstamp,
                max(collector_tstamp) as end_tstamp

            from SNOWPLOW_DEV1.gh_sp_mobile_dbt_1_snplw_mobile_int_tests.snowplow_mobile_events_stg e

            where
                dvce_sent_tstamp <= 

    dateadd(
        day,
        3,
        dvce_created_tstamp
        )

 -- don't process data that's too late
                and collector_tstamp >= 
        cast('2021-03-07 00:00:00' as timestamp)
    
                and collector_tstamp <= 
        cast('2021-11-05 00:00:00' as timestamp)
    
                and true
                and cast(True as boolean) --don't reprocess sessions that have already been processed.
                

            group by 1
        ), new_events_session_ids as (
            select *
            from new_events_session_ids_init e
            

        )
        

        , previous_sessions as (
        select *

        from SNOWPLOW_DEV1.gh_sp_mobile_dbt_1_snowplow_manifest.snowplow_mobile_base_sessions_lifecycle_manifest

        where start_tstamp >= 
        cast('2019-03-08 00:00:00' as timestamp)
    
        and cast(True as boolean) --don't reprocess sessions that have already been processed.
        )

        , session_lifecycle as (
        select
            ns.session_identifier,
            coalesce(self.user_identifier, ns.user_identifier) as user_identifier, -- Edge case 1: Take previous value to keep domain_userid consistent. Not deterministic but performant
            least(ns.start_tstamp, coalesce(self.start_tstamp, ns.start_tstamp)) as start_tstamp,
            greatest(ns.end_tstamp, coalesce(self.end_tstamp, ns.end_tstamp)) as end_tstamp -- BQ 1 NULL will return null hence coalesce

        from new_events_session_ids ns
        left join previous_sessions as self
            on ns.session_identifier = self.session_identifier

        where
            self.session_identifier is null -- process all new sessions
            or self.end_tstamp < 

    dateadd(
        day,
        3,
        self.start_tstamp
        )

 --stop updating sessions exceeding 3 days
        )

        

        select
        sl.session_identifier,
        sl.user_identifier,
        sl.start_tstamp,
        least(

    dateadd(
        day,
        3,
        sl.start_tstamp
        )

, sl.end_tstamp) as end_tstamp -- limit session length to max_session_days
        

        from session_lifecycle sl
    

where session_identifier is not null

select
        s.session_identifier,
        s.user_identifier,
        s.start_tstamp,
        -- end_tstamp used in next step to limit events. When backfilling, set end_tstamp to upper_limit if end_tstamp > upper_limit.
        -- This ensures we don't accidentally process events after upper_limit
        case when s.end_tstamp > 
        cast('2021-11-05 00:00:00' as timestamp)
     then 
        cast('2021-11-05 00:00:00' as timestamp)
     else s.end_tstamp end as end_tstamp

        from SNOWPLOW_DEV1.gh_sp_mobile_dbt_1_snowplow_manifest.snowplow_mobile_base_sessions_lifecycle_manifest s

        where
        -- General window of start_tstamps to limit table scans. Logic complicated by backfills.
        -- To be within the run, session start_tstamp must be >= lower_limit - max_session_days as we limit end_tstamp in manifest to start_tstamp + max_session_days
        s.start_tstamp >= 
        cast('2021-03-04 00:00:00' as timestamp)
    
        and s.start_tstamp <= 
        cast('2021-11-05 00:00:00' as timestamp)
    
        -- Select sessions within window that either; start or finish between lower & upper limit, start and finish outside of lower and upper limits
        and not (s.start_tstamp > 
        cast('2021-11-05 00:00:00' as timestamp)
     or s.end_tstamp < 
        cast('2021-03-07 00:00:00' as timestamp)
    )

with base_query as (
  
        with identified_events AS (
            select
                COALESCE(
                        
e.contexts_com_snowplowanalytics_snowplow_client_session_1[0]:sessionId::TEXT
,NULL
                    ) as session_identifier,
                e.*
                

            from SNOWPLOW_DEV1.gh_sp_mobile_dbt_1_snplw_mobile_int_tests.snowplow_mobile_events_stg e

        )

        select
            a.*,
            b.user_identifier -- take user_identifier from manifest. This ensures only 1 domain_userid per session.

        from identified_events as a
        inner join SNOWPLOW_DEV1.gh_sp_mobile_dbt_1_scratch.snowplow_mobile_base_sessions_this_run as b
        on a.session_identifier = b.session_identifier

        where a.collector_tstamp <= 

    dateadd(
        day,
        3,
        b.start_tstamp
        )


        and a.dvce_sent_tstamp <= 

    dateadd(
        day,
        3,
        a.dvce_created_tstamp
        )


        and a.collector_tstamp >= 
        cast('2021-03-07 22:46:41.963000' as timestamp)
    
        and a.collector_tstamp <= 
        cast('2021-04-21 13:50:44.234000' as timestamp)
    
        and a.collector_tstamp >= b.start_tstamp -- deal with late loading events

        

        and true

        qualify row_number() over (partition by a.event_id order by a.collector_tstamp, a.dvce_created_tstamp) = 1
    
), final as (
  select
    -- screen view events
    a.unstruct_event_com_snowplowanalytics_mobile_screen_view_1:id::varchar(36) AS screen_view_id,
    a.unstruct_event_com_snowplowanalytics_mobile_screen_view_1:name::varchar AS screen_view_name,
    a.unstruct_event_com_snowplowanalytics_mobile_screen_view_1:previousId::varchar(36) AS screen_view_previous_id,
    a.unstruct_event_com_snowplowanalytics_mobile_screen_view_1:previousName::varchar AS screen_view_previous_name,
    a.unstruct_event_com_snowplowanalytics_mobile_screen_view_1:previousType::varchar AS screen_view_previous_type,
    a.unstruct_event_com_snowplowanalytics_mobile_screen_view_1:transitionType::varchar AS screen_view_transition_type,
    a.unstruct_event_com_snowplowanalytics_mobile_screen_view_1:type::varchar AS screen_view_type,
    -- screen context
    
      cast(null as TEXT) as screen_id, --could rename to screen_view_id and coalesce with screen view events.
      cast(null as TEXT) as screen_name,
      cast(null as TEXT) as screen_activity,
      cast(null as TEXT) as screen_fragment,
      cast(null as TEXT) as screen_top_view_controller,
      cast(null as TEXT) as screen_type,
      cast(null as TEXT) as screen_view_controller,
    
    -- mobile context
    
      cast(null as TEXT) as device_manufacturer,

    --last dimensions
    MAX(case when e.event_index_in_session = e.events_in_session then e.build end) as last_build,
    MAX(case when e.event_index_in_session = e.events_in_session then e.version end) as last_version,

      MAX(case when e.event_index_in_session = e.events_in_session then e.event_id end) as session_last_event_id,
    

    -- time
    MIN(e.derived_tstamp) as start_tstamp,
    MAX(e.derived_tstamp) as end_tstamp,
    

  BOOLOR_AGG(
    e.event_name = 'application_install'
  )

  from events e
